overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit indoor market bazaar at night. The player interacts with a pottery vendor and continues through various market stalls including a food stand and magazine stand before approaching an outdoor grill area.

notable_agents.action: vendor in red jacket arranging items on a wooden stall

octagonal wooden kiosk with striped paneling and overhead lighting
green neon arrow sign pointing right mounted on wall
long counter with pottery display and illuminated signage above
retro-style cola advertisement poster on wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered market bazaar illuminated by neon signs and fluorescent lights. The camera moves forward past a circular wooden stall toward a pottery vendor, with various market stalls visible on both sides. A vendor in a red jacket stands attending to goods on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pottery and ceramics stall with warm lighting

events.description: dialogue interaction begins with pottery vendor behind the counter

agents.ego_description: engaging in conversation with the pottery vendor while examining ceramic jars on display

notable_agents.action: bald vendor in white shirt and apron standing behind counter talking to player

entered.detail: collection of blue and white ceramic jars arranged on counter
large decorative ceramic containers with intricate patterns
tall vertical sign with colorful neon lettering on wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the WIDE OPEN stall and initiates dialogue with the vendor behind the counter. The scene focuses on the pottery display with various ceramic jars and warm overhead lighting. The background market elements fade from view as the interaction begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: food market area with steam and cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: walking past the MASAMI MARKET food stall and continuing through the market corridor

cooking area with visible steam and smoke rising from grill
bright green bar stools arranged along counter
market stall with green fabric canopy and fluorescent lighting
tables covered with magazines and printed materials for sale
green circular neon sign with OPEN text

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the pottery stall and walks by the MASAMI MARKET food stand where a chef is cooking. The camera continues forward past a couple browsing goods and approaches a green canopy stall selling magazines. The environment remains covered but shows more open areas ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air grill area with red lighting

events.description: exiting covered market into open-air section with street grill and customers

agents.ego_description: approaching the outdoor grill area where food is being prepared under red lighting

notable_agents.action: vendor in wide-brimmed hat and coat standing at illuminated red grill
customer standing near food preparation area waiting

entered.detail: large street food grill with glowing red embers and cooking surface
illuminated grill casting red light on surrounding area
metal table with food items and cooking utensils
stacked cardboard boxes used for storage and display

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered market area into a darker open-air space with an illuminated street grill. A vendor in a hat tends to the glowing red grill while customers wait nearby. The lighting shifts to a darker, more atmospheric tone with the grill providing the primary light source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit indoor bazaar that eventually opens into a dark, atmospheric outdoor cooking area. It begins by moving through a covered market illuminated by fluorescent signs, passing a circular wooden stall and a vendor in a red jacket before approaching a pottery display. As the camera pauses to interact with the vendor behind the counter, the focus narrows on ceramic jars under warm overhead lighting before shifting back to the wider environment. The scene then expands as the camera moves past the Masami Market food stand and a green magazine canopy, gliding through the crowded bazaar toward the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the covered market into a darker open-air space, where the lighting shifts to a moody tone centered around the red glow of an illuminated street grill.
